hero.name: FitBalance
hero.title: Welcome to FitBalance — your nutrition management system
hero.description: FitBalance helps you manage patients, create personalized meal plans, and organize your appointments.
hero.rightDescription: FitBalance brings all the tools a nutritionist needs into one powerful platform.

services.title: Manage patients
services.description: Organize your clients, design meal plans, and track their progress directly from your browser.

cards.title: Smart client management
cards.subtitle: Manage your patients, track progress, and assign personalized diets easily.

cards.title: Personalized nutrition plans
cards.subtitle: Create, adjust, and deliver custom meal plans to your clients in just a few clicks.

cards.title: Analytics & insights
cards.subtitle: Visualize your patients' progress with detailed charts.
